notes: The raw reset token is obtained from the backend stdout (DEMO MODE). A consumed or unknown token returns 400. All active sessions are invalidated on success.

success.description: Valid reset token and SR-01-compliant new password. Obtain the token from backend stdout after calling /auth/password/reset/request.

failure_invalid_token_400.description: Token does not match any stored hash.

failure_token_reuse_400.description: Re-submitting a token that was already consumed returns 400 (one-time use enforcement).

validation_weak_new_password_422.description: new_password passes length check (>=12) but fails SR-01 complexity in service layer.
